objects.name: Tune In: The Future of AI-Powered Vulnerability Discovery
objects.description: Loaded with extras and produced at a cut price, the crossover SUV has overtaken rival cars from US, Japanese and Korean firms The UK is no stranger to foreign cars. The bestseller lists in recent years have been dominated by the US’s Ford Puma, Japan’s Nissan Qashqai, Korea’s Kia Sportage and occasionally even Tesla’s Model Y. But in March the top 10 provided a shock: a Chinese car leapt into the lead.

external_references.description: Tune In: The Future of AI-Powered Vulnerability Discovery
